lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਆਨੰਦ ਘਣਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨ ਧੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sookh sehaj aanand ghanaa naanak jan dhooraa |
lines.english: Peace, poise, and immense bliss, O Nanak, are obtained, when one becomes the dust of the feet of the humble servants of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਤਪਤਿ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: seetal har har naam simarat tapat jaae |3|
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is soothing and cool; remembering it in meditation, the inner fire is quenched. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦੁ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: gobind gunee nidhaan guramukh jaaneeai |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is the treasure of excellence; He is known only to the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰਜ ਸਗਲੇ ਸਿਧਿ ਭਏ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ॥੪॥੧੦॥੧੧੨॥
lines.translit: kaaraj sagale sidh bhe bhettiaa gur pooraa |4|10|112|
lines.english: All of one's affairs are perfectly resolved, meeting with the Perfect Guru. ||4||10||112||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਮਿਲਾਹ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ਕਹਾਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: aavahu sant milaah har kathaa kahaaneea |
lines.english: Come, O Saints - let us join together and speak the Sermon of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣੀਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hoe kripaal deaal har rang maaneeai |1|
lines.english: When He shows His Mercy and Kindness, we revel in the Lord's Love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਜੀਵਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਅਨਦੁ ਘਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jap jap jeevaa naam hovai anad ghanaa |
lines.english: I live by chanting and meditating on the Naam, and so I obtain immense bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਹ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਜਿ ਲਾਜ ਲੋਕਾਣੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anadin simarah naam taj laaj lokaaneea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Night and day, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and ignore the criticism of others. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਥਿਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਝੂਠਾ ਵਿਣਸਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mithiaa mohu sansaar jhootthaa vinasanaa |2|
lines.english: Attachment to the world is useless and vain; it is false, and perishes in the end. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਸੰਗਿ ਨੇਹੁ ਕਿਨੈ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal sang nehu kinai viralai laaeaa |
lines.english: How rare are those who embrace love for the Lord's Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਸੋਇ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵਈ ॥੪॥੧੧॥੧੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak kai sukh soe jo prabh bhaavee |4|11|113|
lines.english: That alone is Nanak's joy, which is pleasing to God. ||4||11||113||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ਮੁਖੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhan suhaavaa mukh jin har dhiaaeaa |3|
lines.english: Blessed and beautiful is that mouth, which meditates on the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖ ਕਾਲ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਮਿਟਿ ਜਾਵਈ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran dukh kaal simarat mitt jaavee |
lines.english: The pains of birth, death and reincarnation are erased by meditating on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੁ ਮੀਤ ਇਕਤ੍ਰ ਹੋਇ ਰਸ ਕਸ ਸਭਿ ਭੁੰਚਹ ॥
lines.translit: aavahu meet ikatr hoe ras kas sabh bhunchah |
lines.english: Come, O friends: let us meet together and enjoy all the tastes and flavors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਹ ਮਿਲਿ ਪਾਪਾ ਮੁੰਚਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: amrit naam har har japah mil paapaa munchah |1|
lines.english: Let us join together and chant the Ambrosial Name of the Lord, Har, Har, and so wipe away our sins. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਹੁ ਤਾ ਤੇ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: tat veechaarahu sant janahu taa te bighan na laagai |
lines.english: Reflect upon the essence of reality, O Saintly beings, and no troubles shall afflict you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੀਨ ਭਏ ਸਭਿ ਤਸਕਰਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਨੁ ਜਾਗੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kheen bhe sabh tasakaraa guramukh jan jaagai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: All of the thieves shall be destroyed, as the Gurmukhs remain wakeful. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੁਧਿ ਗਰੀਬੀ ਖਰਚੁ ਲੈਹੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਜਾਰਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: budh gareebee kharach laihu haumai bikh jaarahu |
lines.english: Take wisdom and humility as your supplies, and burn away the poison of pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਹਟੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਉਦਾ ਵਖਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਾਪਾਰਹੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saachaa hatt pooraa saudaa vakhar naam vaapaarahu |2|
lines.english: True is that shop, and perfect the transaction; deal only in the merchandise of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਧਨੁ ਅਰਪਿਆ ਸੇਈ ਪਤਿਵੰਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd dhan arapiaa seee pativante |
lines.english: They alone are accepted and approved, who dedicate their souls, bodies and wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਦੁ ਜੋ ਪੀਵਤੇ ਬਿਖਲੀ ਪਤਿ ਕਮਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: duramat mad jo peevate bikhalee pat kamalee |
lines.english: Those fools, who drink in the wine of evil-mindedness, become the husbands of prostitutes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨੜੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਣਿਆ ਨਿਤ ਕੇਲ ਕਰੰਤੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aapanarre prabh bhaaniaa nit kel karante |3|
lines.english: Those who are pleasing to their God, celebrate in happiness. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਸਾਇਣਿ ਜੋ ਰਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚ ਅਮਲੀ ॥੪॥੧੨॥੧੧੪॥
lines.translit: raam rasaaein jo rate naanak sach amalee |4|12|114|
lines.english: But those who are imbued with the sublime essence of the Lord, O Nanak, are intoxicated with the Truth. ||4||12||114||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਮੁ ਕੀਆ ਕਰਾਇਆ ਆਰੰਭੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: audam keea karaaeaa aaranbh rachaaeaa |
lines.english: I made the effort; I did it, and made a beginning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੇ ਜਪਿ ਜੀਵਣਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam jape jap jeevanaa gur mantru drirraaeaa |1|
lines.english: I live by chanting and meditating on the Naam. The Guru has implanted this Mantra within me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਇ ਪਰਹ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਕੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਭਰਮੁ ਬਿਦਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paae parah satiguroo kai jin bharam bidaariaa |
lines.english: I fall at the Feet of the True Guru, who has dispelled my doubts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਜਿ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh aapanee sach saaj savaariaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Bestowing His Mercy, God has dressed me, and decorated me with the Truth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਆਪਣੇ ਸਚੁ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਰਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kar geh leene aapane sach hukam rajaaee |
lines.english: Taking me by the hand, He made me His own, through the True Order of His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਦਿਤੀ ਦਾਤਿ ਸਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo prabh ditee daat saa pooran vaddiaaee |2|
lines.english: That gift which God gave to me, is perfect greatness. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈਅਹਿ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੁਰਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa gun gaaeeeh jap naam muraaree |
lines.english: Forever and ever, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and chant the Name of the Destroyer of ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੇਮੁ ਨਿਬਾਹਿਓ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nem nibaahio satiguroo prabh kirapaa dhaaree |3|
lines.english: My vows have been honored, by the Grace of God and the True Guru, who has showered His Mercy. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ਲਾਭੁ ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਦਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: naam dhan gun gaau laabh poorai gur ditaa |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has given the wealth of the Naam, and the profit of singing the Lord's Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣਜਾਰੇ ਸੰਤ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਹੁ ਅਮਿਤਾ ॥੪॥੧੩॥੧੧੫॥
lines.translit: vanajaare sant naanakaa prabh saahu amitaa |4|13|115|
lines.english: The Saints are the traders, O Nanak, and the Infinite Lord God is their Banker. ||4||13||115||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਤੁਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਵਡਭਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa tthaakur tuhee prabh taa ke vaddabhaagaa |
lines.english: One who has You as His Master, O God, is blessed with great destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਚਾਕਰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਕੇ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਭਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: ham chaakar gobind ke tthaakur meraa bhaaraa |
lines.english: I am the slave of the Lord of the Universe; my Master is the greatest of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ਸਦ ਸੁਖੀ ਸਭੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ohu suhelaa sad sukhee sabh bhram bhau bhaagaa |1|
lines.english: He is happy, and forever at peace; his doubts and fears are all dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਅਉਰੁ ਕੋ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਕਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: doojaa naahee aaur ko taa kaa bhau kareeai |
lines.english: There is no other whom I should fear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨ ਕਰਾਵਨ ਸਗਲ ਬਿਧਿ ਸੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karan karaavan sagal bidh so satiguroo hamaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is the Creator, the Cause of causes; He is my True Guru. ||1||Pause||
